content: Live test of per-task artifacts after the chat-cli commit fix in 0.4.100. Please follow the per-task artifacts contract — write all four files into .kody/tasks/<this-session-id>/ before your final reply. Memory-recs and followups can be empty arrays; handoff-notes should be one short paragraph explaining this is a smoke test.

All four per-task artifact files written successfully:

```
.kody/tasks/53DCD471-258D-408F-B090-69C66ACD17CC/
├── context.json       (474 bytes)
├── followups.json     (2 bytes - empty)
├── handoff-notes.md   (291 bytes)
└── memory-recs.json   (2 bytes - empty)
```

Smoke test passed — per-task artifacts contract is working after the chat-cli 0.4.100 fix.
